parameters.name: message
parameters.value: ={{ "Server " + $json.serverInfo.name + " (" + $json.serverInfo.ip + ") has firewall blocking port 8000, which is needed for service communication" }}

parameters.name: suggestedAction
parameters.value: Run 'sudo firewall-cmd --permanent --add-port=8000/tcp' and 'sudo firewall-cmd --reload' to open port 8000
